Title: Wasusei Furîza No. 79 Fukkatsu no Bejîta!!
Writer: Akira Toriyama, Aya Matsui, Takao Koyama
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: Son Gohan, Kuririn, and Buruma continue looking for the Dragon Balls. They have to retrieve one from inside a tornado, and they go to a castle where a giant lives to find the next one. Meanwhile, Son Goku sneaks out of the hospita...
